case_title: HEAVY HITTERS MUSIC GROUP, LLC. VS. GLASSDOOR, INC.

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF VENUE CHALLENGE MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.
CHALLENGE TO VENUE FILED FILED BY DEFENDANT GLASSDOOR, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HEAVY HITTERS MUSIC GROUP, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT GLASSDOOR, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-15-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$AMOUNT NOT GIVEN) SERVED DEC-11-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GLASSDOOR, INC.
PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSE TO DEFENDANT'S CHALLENGE TO VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF HEAVY HITTERS MUSIC GROUP, LLC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
